name: Slime Journey
author: Poki
description: Slime Journey is a puzzle platformer where you guide a bouncy Slime to the finish line! Rotate platforms, manipulate gravity, and use all sorts of tricks to help Slime navigate through tricky levels. Watch out for dangerous obstacles along the way! Explore a magical world, solve brain-teasing puzzles, and chase your sworn enemy through hundreds of exciting challenges. Can you master the Slime's journey? How to play Slime Journey? Click and hold to rotate the platform, or use A/D or left and right arrow keys to rotate. Who created Slime Journey? Slime Journey is created by Nineties Games. This is their first game on Poki! How can I play Slime Journey for free? You can play Slime Journey for free on Poki. Can I play Slime Journey on mobile devices and desktop? Slime Journey can be played on your computer and mobile devices like phones and tablets.
